title: Supply Chain Manager - FedEx India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - FedEx India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
